prestazioni: Engine swap to a GM L77 6.0L LS3 V8 (430 HP, 424 lb-ft) with a Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission, retaining the original Skylark GS subframe for chassis compatibility while reinforcing with Global West subframe connectors and a Detroit Speed front K-member for LS engine mounts.

Forced induction via a Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA turbocharger (62mm, 58lb/min) on a custom stainless steel header setup by Stainless Works, paired with a Turbosmart 45mm Hyper-Gate45 wastegate and a Vibrant Performance 3.5" v-band downpipe into a custom 3.5" dual exhaust with Borla Pro XS mufflers.

Fuel system upgrade featuring a Fore Innovations 450 LPH fuel pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Holley Dominator ECU with a custom tune by Lund Racing, supplemented by a Nitrous Express GenX 200-shot direct-port nitrous system for on-demand power.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a Rare Fabrication Skylark GS-specific kit, extending fenders by 3" in the front and 4" in the rear, paired with a custom carbon fiber hood by RK Sport with a functional cowl induction scoop.

Suspension overhaul with a RideTech 4-link rear coilover system (24-way adjustable) and QA1 front coilovers (12-way adjustable), combined with a Detroit Speed QUADRALink rear suspension and Baer 13" Extreme Plus 6-piston front brake calipers with 14" rear rotors.

Interior rework featuring a full TMI Products custom upholstery kit in black Alcantara with red stitching, a custom roll cage by The Chassis Shop (8-point, bolt-in), and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG Innovations quick-release hub, paired with a custom gauge cluster by Dakota Digital RTX series.
